/**
 * @name MainSidebar
 * @description A sidebar without icon-only collapsed state. Supports offcanvas (slide in/out) and none (always visible) modes.
 * @registryDependencies sidebar
 * @type registry:ui
 */
"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import { Sidebar } from "@/components/ui/sidebar"

export {
  SidebarContent as MainSidebarContent,
  SidebarFooter as MainSidebarFooter,
  SidebarGroup as MainSidebarGroup,
  SidebarGroupAction as MainSidebarGroupAction,
  SidebarGroupContent as MainSidebarGroupContent,
  SidebarGroupLabel as MainSidebarGroupLabel,
  SidebarHeader as MainSidebarHeader,
  SidebarInput as MainSidebarInput,
  SidebarInset as MainSidebarInset,
  SidebarMenu as MainSidebarMenu,
  SidebarMenuAction as MainSidebarMenuAction,
  SidebarMenuBadge as MainSidebarMenuBadge,
  SidebarMenuButton as MainSidebarMenuButton,
  SidebarMenuItem as MainSidebarMenuItem,
  SidebarMenuSkeleton as MainSidebarMenuSkeleton,
  SidebarMenuSub as MainSidebarMenuSub,
  SidebarMenuSubButton as MainSidebarMenuSubButton,
  SidebarMenuSubItem as MainSidebarMenuSubItem,
  SidebarProvider as MainSidebarProvider,
  SidebarSeparator as MainSidebarSeparator,
  SidebarTrigger as MainSidebarTrigger,
  useSidebar as useMainSidebar,
} from "@/components/ui/sidebar"

function MainSidebar({
  collapsible = "offcanvas",
  ...props
}: Omit<React.ComponentProps<typeof Sidebar>, "collapsible"> & {
  collapsible?: "offcanvas" | "none"
}) {
  return <Sidebar collapsible={collapsible} {...props} />
}

export { MainSidebar }
